extDescription.message: Mind map PNG and document download for MindGraph — Chrome and Edge.

mainTagline.message: From page to structured map — one gesture.

tabGenerate.description: Popup tab for mind map generation

mindmateSetupHint.message: Connect MindGraph first — add your server URL, account, and API token in Settings.

mindmateGoSettings.description: Button to open settings tab from MindMate

mindmateReadingPage.description: Capturing web page for first MindMate message

mindmateIncludePage.description: Checkbox to attach page markdown to first MindMate message

mindmatePageContextNotFirstMessage.message: Page content is only attached to the first message in a new chat.
mindmatePageContextNotFirstMessage.description: Page context disabled after first message

mindmatePageContextIntro.message: [MindGraph extension · page context] The user is reading a web page in Chrome/Edge and attached extracted page text below for MindMate (thinking-teaching copilot).

mindmatePageContextRouting.message: [Routing] Classify intent, retrieve knowledge, and answer using the user question above only. The page body below is material the teacher is reading—not a request to generate new content. If the material looks like a lesson plan but the user did not explicitly ask to create/write/design a new lesson plan, do not route to lesson-plan generation.
mindmatePageContextRouting.description: MindMate classifier routing note for Dify

mindmatePageContextGuidance.message: Assume the user is likely a K-12 teacher preparing or researching lessons, focused on thinking-development classrooms. Answer using both the reference material and the user's question. If the material is a lesson plan, slide text, article, or policy doc, you may proactively discuss possible student misconceptions, cognitive-conflict design, conceptual/process variations, and suitable thinking visualization or strategy tools. If the question is unrelated to the material, prioritize the question. Answer directly; do not mention the browser extension, markdown extraction, or this message format.
mindmatePageContextGuidance.description: MindMate page context teaching guidance for Dify

mindmatePageContextSource_smartedu_pdf.message: SmartEdu (courseware / lesson plan / task sheet PDFs)

mindmatePageContextQuestion.message: **User question (classify intent and answer from this line):** $1
mindmatePageContextQuestion.description: MindMate page context user question line

errMindMatePageEmpty.message: This page has no readable content. Select text on the page or try another page.

mindmateCaptureDebugHint.description: Prefix for MindMate page capture failure debug summary

errMindMateCanvasPreviewEmpty.message: This site renders the document as images (canvas). Scroll to load preview pages, select text to send, or use a PDF/text download when available.
errMindMateCanvasPreviewEmpty.description: MindMate canvas-only reader with no extractable text

mindmateNoticeWenkuPreview.message: Baidu Wenku: text may be limited to about $1 preview pages without VIP.
mindmateNoticeWenkuPreview.description: MindMate wenku preview cap notice prepended to markdown

mindmateNoticeCanvasHost.message: Document preview may be image-based; extracted text can be partial.
mindmateNoticeCanvasHost.description: MindMate canvas host partial text notice

errMindMateNotConfigured.message: Not connected yet. Open Settings and save your MindGraph credentials.

errMindMateLoginExpired.message: Your login expired. Update your API token in Settings.

errMindMateConnectFailed.message: Could not reach MindMate. Check your server URL and try again.

errMindMateStreamFailed.message: MindMate could not reply. Please try again.

errMindMateDailyTokenCap.message: Daily AI token limit reached. Try again tomorrow or use the web app for details.
errMindMateDailyTokenCap.description: Daily token cap from server SSE

errMindMateThinkingCoins.message: Not enough thinking coins for this message.
errMindMateThinkingCoins.description: Thinking coin insufficient from server SSE

localServerHttpWarning.message: Local dev uses HTTP — API tokens and page content are not encrypted on the network. Use only on a trusted machine.
localServerHttpWarning.description: Warning when localhost server preset is selected

downloadTagline.message: Save PDFs and documents from supported sites (no video).

downloadUnsupportedPage.message: This page is not supported for download. Open a document on SmartEdu, Baidu Wenku, 360doc, Docin, etc., then open this panel again.
downloadUnsupportedPage.description: Hint when current tab has no document extract host

btnSaveToFileCenter.description: Button to save page content into a Document Summary package

statusSavedToFileCenter.message: Saved to Document Summary. Indexing started.
statusSavedToFileCenter.description: Status after saving page into a package

settingsLead.message: Use the same credentials as the MindGraph API token flow.

errFailed.message: Something went wrong. Try again, or reload the extension on chrome://extensions.

errDownloadPrepare.message: Could not start the file download. Reload the extension, then try again (Chrome 109+ or Edge 120+).
errDownloadPrepare.description: Blob URL, offscreen, or data-URL download prep failed

errSettingsIncomplete.message: Settings are incomplete. Open Settings and enter your MindGraph URL, phone number, and API token.

errNoPageText.message: No text found on this page. Select some text first, or try a different page.

errApi.message: MindGraph server error ($1). Check Settings and try again.

errRestrictedPage.message: This page type is not supported. Open a normal website (http or https) and try again.

errRateLimit.message: Too many requests. Wait a minute and try again.

errServiceUnavailable.message: Service temporarily unavailable. Try again later.

errFetchTimeout.message: The server took too long to respond (over 3 minutes). Try again or check your network.

errVerifyTimeout.message: Credential check timed out. Try again or check your network.

errNotPng.message: The server did not return a PNG image. Check your base URL and account.

docExtractDetectedSite.description: Friendly site label for Download tab

docExtractActiveTab.description: Hostname of the tab used for extract preview

docExtractPageCount.message: About $1 pages visible — scroll the preview to load more before you extract.

docExtractScrollHint.message: Scroll the document preview to load pages first. On Baidu Wenku, do not click “Expand full text” — it opens the paid VIP screen.
docExtractScrollHint.description: Autoscroll hint when page count unknown

btnSyncSmartEduToken.description: Read ND_UC_AUTH from open SmartEdu tabs

smarteduPasteTokenPrompt.message: Paste SmartEdu access_token (only if auto-sync fails):

smarteduTokenMissing.message: SmartEdu token: not found — log in at auth.smartedu.cn, open a SmartEdu page, then tap Sync

statusExtractDownloadStarted.message: Done — your file download should start in a moment.

statusWenkuPreviewLimited.message: Download started — no VIP found, so only the first $1 preview pages were saved (Baidu Wenku free limit is about 8).
statusWenkuPreviewLimited.description: Success notice when Wenku preview is capped

errExtractFailed.message: Could not download this document. Refresh the page and try again.

errExtractNoPages.message: No document pages found. Scroll the preview to load pages, then try Extract again.

errExtractNoText.message: No article text found on this page. Try a different page or section.

errExtractRetry.message: The page was not ready. Refresh the tab and try Extract again.

errExtractSmartEduNoFiles.message: No downloadable files found on this SmartEdu lesson. Pick another activity or check asset checkboxes.

errExtractSmartEduLogin.message: SmartEdu login needed. Sign in at auth.smartedu.cn, open the lesson page, then tap Sync login from SmartEdu.

errExtractSmartEduDownload.message: SmartEdu blocked the download. Sync your login again or try another file.

errExtractSmartEduVideoUnsupported.message: Video download is not supported. Choose PDF or document files only.

errExtractWrongPage.message: This link is not a supported document page. Open the document viewer and try again.

errExtractWenkuNoPreview.message: Nothing to save yet. On Baidu Wenku, scroll the free preview (do not click Expand full text), then try again.

errExtractLoginRequired.message: This site requires you to log in first. Sign in on the website, then try Extract again.

errExtractDownloadBlocked.message: The website refused the download. You may need to log in, pay, or use a VIP account.

errExtractCnkiCaptcha.message: CNKI is showing a captcha. Complete the puzzle in the browser tab, then try Extract again.

labelSaveAs.message: Ask where to save each file

stageServerProcessing.message: Server is generating your mind map…

errNetwork.message: Could not reach the server. Check the base URL and your network.

errPortDisconnected.message: Connection lost. Click Extract again. If it keeps failing, reload MindGraph on chrome://extensions.

commandGenerateDescription.message: Generate mind map from the current page

labelUiLanguage.description: UI and API language for generated diagram

optionLangAuto.description: UI and diagram language follow browser

optionLangZhCN.description: UI and diagram in Simplified Chinese

optionLangZhTW.description: UI and diagram in Traditional Chinese

labelTokenStatus.description: Short label for token line meta

tokenStatusExpired.message: This API token is expired. Create a new one in the web app (Account / API).

tokenStatusNoToken.message: No active API token on the server, or the token is expired. Verify your token or create one in the app.

tokenStatusUnknown.message: Could not load token expiry. Check network or save settings again.

linkViewInLibrary.description: Link shown after successful generation to open the saved diagram in the web editor

errLibraryFull.message: Library full (20 diagrams). Delete a saved diagram to enable saving future mind maps.
errLibraryFull.description: Shown when the user's diagram library quota is reached and the generated diagram could not be saved
